message:
feat(tui): add agents, reservations, and tool metrics TUI screens

Expand the server TUI with three new dedicated screens for operational
visibility:

tui_screens/agents.rs:
- New screen displaying registered agents with activity timestamps,
  model info, and task descriptions

tui_screens/reservations.rs:
- New screen showing active file reservations with holder, pattern,
  exclusivity, TTL countdown, and reason

tui_screens/tool_metrics.rs:
- New screen presenting per-tool call counts, latency percentiles,
  and error rates for performance monitoring

tui_screens/mod.rs:
- Register the three new screen modules

tui_app.rs:
- Wire new screens into the TUI navigation and tab routing

tui_screens/dashboard.rs:
- Enhance dashboard with additional summary widgets and layout
  refinements to complement the new detail screens

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
